# BP-162 positive: a parallel test mutates package-level state.
lang: go
file: BP-162-vulnerable_test.go
variant: shared-parallel-state
---
package sample

import "testing"

var sharedResults = map[string]int{}

func TestParallelWritesSharedState(t *testing.T) {
	t.Parallel()
	sharedResults["ready"] = 1
}
